title: Blue Number 21 Balloons - 40 Inch Latex & Mylar Foil Balloons for 21st Birthday Parties
features: 💕 Blue Number 21 Balloons Set 💕 - You will get 2pcs 40 inch mylar foil number balloons (number 1 + number 2), 5pcs blue confetti latex balloons, 1pc straw and 1pc balloon ribbon. Perfect for decorating 12th or 21st birthday party.

💕 Large Size & High Quality 💕 - This giant 40" mylar number balloons are made of high quality aluminum foil, the confetti balloons are made of natural latex, all the balloons are safe, durable, non-toxic, strong and light. The number foil balloons can be reused. Just fill 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely.

💕 Easy to Inflate 💕 - The big number foil balloons have self-sealing valve does not need to be knotted for easy inflation and deflation. It can be inflated with air or helium. When filled with helium, the balloons can float in the air; after filling, press the valve of the digital balloon to seal it. It can be reused. Do not throw away after use!

💕 Repeated Use 💕 - The number balloons with confetti balloons kit contains a straw that can be used to deflate the foil balloon, simply insert the straw into the valve and press gently until the gas is completely expelled. After use, it can be folded and stored for reuse.

💕 Perfect Party Decorations 💕 - The shiny blue number 21 mylar foil Balloons with pack of 5 blue confetti latex balloons is ideal for boys girls 21st birthday party balloons, as a backdrop or photo props, pool party, men and women 21st anniversary event wedding party, baby shower party, engagement ceremony, graduation party decorations supplies.
description: 🌟 Blue Number 21 Balloons with Confetti Balloons Kit is not only used for Boys Girls Women Men 21st Birthday, but also 21st Wedding Anniversary, Company 21st Anniversary, School 21st Anniversary and as Variety Party Decorations Supplies. 🌟 Specifications: 💛 Material: Aluminium Foil, Latex with Confetti 💛 Color: Blue 💛 Size: 40 inch+12 inch 💛 Quantity: 10pcs What You Get: 🎁 2 x 40 Inch Number Foil Balloons (Optional 13, 16, 17, 18, 21, 30, 40, 50, 60, 65) 🎁 5 x 12 Inch Blue Confetti Balloons 🎁 1 x Ribbon (32ft/6m) 🎁 1 x Straw (8 inch) Features: 🎉 40 inch super large digital number foil balloon with metallic texture appearances. 🎉 The balloons are made of high-quality foil or natural latex, which is safe for children and can be used multiple times. 🎉 Each number is independent. E.g, You can use the number 21 balloons as 1, 2, 21, 12. There are other combinations of digital balloons for you to choose and match. 🎉 These birthday decoration balloons can be filled with air and helium, the latex balloons can float when filled with helium. 🎉 There are holes on the bottom and top of the number balloons, you can use the balloon ribbon to hang the number balloon or stick it on the wall. 🎉 Suitable for a variety of party activities: birthday party/prom/graduation/wedding/engagement/anniversary/bridal shower/baby shower/holiday party/new year/other party events, etc. Warm Reminder: ⚠ Please don't over inflate the number balloons, 80%-90% is the best ⚠ Keep the balloons away from the flame, lemon juice or sharp objects, avoid exploding. ⚠ Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. ⚠ Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error.
